title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 249.220 - Trustees may promulgate rules and regulations
text:
249.220.  Trustees may promulgate rules and regulations. — The sewer district through its board of trustees may promulgate reasonable rules and regulations concerning the construction, maintenance and use of the sewer system or systems constructed and/or maintained by the district.
(RSMo 1939 § 12670)
